summary: Backend-only testing of DashAI multi-tenant SaaS. All 27 pytest cases passed (100%). Covered: health, FB OAuth URL builder (scopes+state), webhook verify (200/403) and POST signature (401/200 with valid HMAC), JWT auth gating on 8 protected endpoints, /auth/me, tenant GET/PATCH+onboard (owner role), KB CRUD+RBAC viewer 403, tenant isolation (cross-tenant 403), team invite+accept flow producing 2 members, leads list+404 PATCH, comments filter, approvals list+404 action, analytics overview/sentiment-trend/categories, and pages/discover graceful 502 with invalid FB token.

minor.issue: In-memory _state_cache in routers/auth.py is not durable across worker restarts; OK for MVP but flag for prod (use Redis/Mongo TTL).
Invite token never expires; consider adding TTL/expiry field.

POST handler does not validate signature when FB_APP_SECRET is placeholder; this test relied on the real secret in .env which is currently placeholder. Worked because HMAC is computed deterministically with whatever secret is configured. In prod ensure real FB_APP_SECRET is set.
PATCH uses ?status= query param matched by comment_id field (not lead id) — fine for current schema but inconsistent naming.

action_items: FB_APP_ID and FB_APP_SECRET are placeholders (YOUR_APP_ID / YOUR_APP_SECRET) in /app/backend/.env — required for real OAuth/webhook flows.
Consider moving _state_cache from in-memory dict to Redis/Mongo with TTL.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: _state_cache is process-local and unbounded; small memory leak risk and not multi-worker safe.
approvals.py: GET enriches with comment via N+1 queries; consider $lookup for scale.

analytics.py overview: today_filter compares ISO string to date().isoformat() ('YYYY-MM-DD') against full ISO timestamps stored in created_at — string compare works because ISO timestamps sort lexicographically, but explicit ISO date prefix is fragile if timezone formats differ.
team.py accept: existing-member branch still calls $set status accepted using _id from Mongo — fine but mixes _id usage; consider using token field.
webhooks.py _process_change: relies on tenant document being present; missing null guards if tenant deleted while page connected.
test_credentials: Seeded TEST_ users/tenants dynamically per test session using core.security.create_jwt. Cleanup not performed (data prefixed TEST_).
seed_data_creation: Each session seeds 3 user+tenant+member combos with TEST_ prefix directly via motor; FB token is a Fernet-encrypted fake string.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Pages/discover returns 502 as expected with placeholder FB creds. Frontend testing was explicitly skipped. To run again: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/backend_test.py -v.
